creator: hlh@restart.be
text:
(In reply to Kristof Provost from comment #42)

I upgrade the PINE64 to CURRENT 324563 and now ntpd can't keep the clock for a long time - after one hour or 2, the clock run too fast. I think that this clock drift is correlated with the pf problem.
Does pf is sensitive to a clock running too fast and beeing reset backward by ntpd?
